rows.query: approximately three-quarters of total completed cases involving with multiple charges resulted in a guilty outcome.
r&d plant funding increased substantially by 27%.
rows.code:
col = "most recent 5 years > 2012-13"
vals = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('r&d plant funding', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce')

rows.query: those with lifetime suicidal thoughts had more than three times the odds, compared with those who never had suicidal thoughts.
rows.code:
col = "first nations > men > adjusted probability"
vals = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors='coerce')
suicidal_thoughts = df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('lifetime suicidal thoughts', case=False, na=False), col]
no_suicidal_thoughts = df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('never had suicidal thoughts', case=False, na=False), col]
suicidal_thoughts_val = pd.to_numeric(suicidal_thoughts, errors='coerce').iloc[0]
no_suicidal_thoughts_val = pd.to_numeric(no_suicidal_thoughts, errors='coerce').iloc[0]
result = suicidal_thoughts_val / no_suicidal_thoughts_val
print(result)

rows.query: the unemployment rate of arab women was 10.7 percentage points higher than that of women who did not belong to a visible minority group.
rows.code:
col = "total"
arab_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('arab', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
not_visible_minority_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('not a visible minority', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
result = arab_val - not_visible_minority_val
print(result)

rows.query: among cases completed in youth criminal court, theft accounted for 16% of offences involving a female accused.
rows.code:
col = "female > 12 to 15 years of age > number"
col2 = "female > 16 to 17 years of age > number"
col3 = "female > total females > number"
col4 = "property offences > theft"

theft_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('theft', case=False, na=False), col3], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
total_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('total youth', case=False, na=False), col3], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
result = (theft_val / total_val) * 100
print(result)

rows.query: chinese women had higher employment rates than third-plus generation white women by observed.
rows.code:
col = "observed employment rate > women"
chinese_women_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('chinese', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
third_plus_gen_white_women_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('third-plus generation whites', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
result = chinese_women_val > third_plus_gen_white_women_val
print(result)

rows.query: for females found guilty in ipv cases, probation was more often considered.
rows.code:
col = "accused females > number"
ipv_probation_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('ipv cases > probation', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
ipv_custody_val = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('ipv cases > custody', case=False, na=False), col], errors='coerce').iloc[0]
result = ipv_probation_val > ipv_custody_val
print(result)

rows.query: between 2000 and 2010,the percentage of immigrants intending to settle in saskatchewan rose from less than 0.8% to 2.7%.

saskatchewan_2010 = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[df['row_header'].str.contains('saskatchewan', case=False, na=False), col_2010], errors='coerce').iloc[0]

result = saskatchewan_2010 - saskatchewan_2000
print(result)
